allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Redesign frontend with Svelte 5, Tailwind CSS, and Ørsted CVI

Replace vanilla HTML/JS/CSS frontend with a Svelte 5 + Vite app using
Tailwind CSS v4. Apply Ørsted corporate visual identity \(cerulean blue
#009ADD, Inter font, no pure black, Scandinavian clean design\).

Key changes:
- Collapsible sidebar with icon strip when collapsed
- Revenue impact panel moved above schedule with delta percentages
- AI analysis as a clickable drawer below the schedule
- Gantt chart with softer colors, drop shadows, proper task names
- Timeline trimmed to remove empty trailing space
- Breakdowns renamed to Scenarios
- Fix OR-Tools float->int bug in optimizer parameter passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
